title: hymenopappus sulphureus
intro: Hymenopappus sulphureus, also known as the orange sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hymenopappus sulphureus include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves for topical application, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat colds, coughs, and sore throats.
